What It Does: Project entry point. Claude Code reads this first on every session. Contains boot sequence, non-negotiable rules, skill security rules.
Public-facing documentation. What the repo is, how to install, what it does.
Full enterprise setup guide. Installation, stakeholder roles, CVE tiers, CI/CD setup, troubleshooting.
MIT license. Allows free use, modification, distribution.
Master setup script. Asks 7 questions, creates manifest, copies all files, sets OS permissions, verifies installation.
When To Edit: On new feature requiring init change

What It Does: JSON schema definition for manifest.json. Validates all manifest fields.
Working example manifest with all fields populated. Use as template for new projects.
Org-level manifest template. Locked fields pushed to all projects via Claude Code Enterprise.
Secrets template. NEVER commit the real version. Contains API keys, S3 config, audit key.
When To Edit: Reference only — edit real file in .raven/

What It Does: Priority 1 agent. Hard blocks everything if manifest.json is missing or invalid. Only agent that blocks during coding.
Priority 2 agent. Fires on import detection. Three-tier CVE check. Triggers approval flow for unknown libraries.
Priority 3 agent. Advises during coding. Hard blocks at git commit. Checks lines, print(), type hints, docstrings.
Priority 4 agent. Warns on new file creation. 24hr grace period then hard blocks commits until architecture.md filled.
Session memory agent. Runs on session start/end. Indexes decisions, reduces repeated context by 95%. Uses Haiku model.
Security agent. Monitors all skill activity. Blocks restricted file access. Checks approved_skills list in manifest.
Entry skill. Loads manifest live via ! injection. Routes to rule files on demand. ~100 tokens at startup.
Stack rules loaded only when import detected. Checks against manifest. Calls cve-check.py.
Style rules loaded only on style check. Max lines, type hints, docstrings, logging.
Architecture rules loaded on file create. Checks architecture.md exists and has version header.
Commit gate rules loaded at commit time. Lists all 5 checks in order.
L99 mode. No hedging, no 'it depends'. World-class specialist depth on any topic.
Architecture-first planning. Reads manifest live. Forces dependency map before any code.
Manifest-aware code review. Checks stack + style + security against approved libraries.
CVE-aware security review. Calls cve-check.py and secret-scan.py. Use before every merge.
Enforces 150 lines, type hints, logging, polars over pandas in one pass.
Test-first discipline. Writes failing tests before implementation. pytest + edge cases + mocks.
Docstrings + architecture.md updates + manifest changelog on every structural change.
Work orchestrator + Drama Mode. Expert panel debates. OODA diagrams. Strategy docs. Cross-domain.
Claude Code hooks config. Wires PreToolUse → tool-guard.py and PostToolUse → audit-log.py. Set to chmod 444 after install.
Local git hook. 5 checks: manifest, secrets, CVE, style, deletions. Runs on every git commit. Can be bypassed with --no-verify.
Server-side git hook. Cannot be bypassed. Runs on every git push. Includes 100-word health report.
Three-tier CVE scanner. Tier 1/2: whitelist auto-approve. Tier 3: PyPI Safety + GPT-5.4-Cyber dual check.
When To Edit: If CVE tiers or patterns change

What It Does: Regex secret detection on staged files. AWS keys, OpenAI keys, passwords, SSH keys, Bearer tokens.
PreToolUse hook. Checks every URL, MCP call, bash command against manifest.allowed_tools before execution.
PostToolUse hook. Encrypts + compresses every tool call → S3. Silent if S3 not configured. Local fallback optional.
Called by pre-commit + Guard on violations. Same encrypted S3 path. Silent if not configured.
Run once on init. Generates Fernet encryption key for audit logs. Add output to manifest.secrets.json.
Search + audit + install skills from anthropics/skills and GitHub. Security audit before install. Approval required.
Installs Claude Mem. Updates CLAUDE.md with memory instructions. Run once per developer machine.
Forces plan before code. Reads manifest + architecture.md. Generates dependency map + file structure.
Architect approves a library. Updates manifest + changelog. Use after Prism7 approval email received.
Full boot diagnostic. Checks all 8 layers. Reports CLEARED or errors with fix instructions.
Manual P1/P2/P3 incident creation. Notifies Prism7. Creates audit entry.
Search skills from Claude interface. Calls skill-search.py. Shows results + audit + approval flow.
GitHub Actions workflow. Runs on every push + PR. Manifest check, secret scan, CVE scan. Copy to .github/workflows/.
GitLab CI config. Equivalent to GitHub Actions. Copy to repo root as .gitlab-ci.yml.
On-prem runner script. Jenkins/Gitea compatible. Runs manifest + secret checks.
Living architecture template. Generated on init. Fill all sections within 24hrs or commits blocked.
7-layer Core architecture diagram. HTML. Open in browser.
Enterprise usage + business value diagram. HTML. CISO/CXO-facing.
Drama Mode Scene 1 diagrams. OODA + flowchart + tech arch for Gemini enforcement decision.
Guard entry point. Hard block rules, SLA table, escalation ladder. Claude Code reads on session open.
Guard public documentation. What Guard is, 6 agents, approval flow, SLA table.
Guard setup script. Installs 6 agents + scripts. Requires Core installed first. Asks 3 questions.
Watches git operations. Force push → hard block. Deletions with GUARD:ALLOW-DELETE → approval flow.
Watches DB operations. TRUNCATE/DROP → hard block. Mass delete >100 rows → approval flow.
Watches Terraform/S3/VM/K8s. State file → hard block. S3 delete → approval flow.
Monitors logs/metrics. P1 >50x spike, P2 >10x, P3 anomaly. No hard blocks — classifies only.
Watches network rules. 0.0.0.0/0 → hard block. RDP/SSH public → hard block. Rule changes → approval.
Coordinates all Guard agents. P1: 15min, P2: 1hr, P3: 24hr. Escalation ladder. Calls guard-notify.py.
Notification brain. P1 → PagerDuty + Prism7. P2 → Prism7 only. P3 → digest. Silent if not configured.
Reads digest.log, formats, sends to Prism7, clears log. Run via cron: 0 8 * * 1.
Same as Core version. Sends Guard violations to S3 audit bucket. Silent if not configured.
Same as Core version. PostToolUse hook for Guard sessions. Encrypted S3 write.
THE stack declaration. Language, cloud, DB, approved libraries, guard config, style rules. Commit this.
When To Edit: Every standard or stack change — bump version

What It Does: THE secrets file. Approval inbox, API keys, S3 config, encryption key. chmod 600. NEVER commit.
Living architecture doc. Must be filled within 24hrs of first file creation. Version on every change.
Gitignores manifest.secrets.json and .cache/. Do not modify.
Local fallback audit log. Only written if S3 not configured and local_fallback:true.
Guard P2/P3 events buffer. Read by guard-weekly-digest.py every Monday. Cleared after send.
